description.p1: Hi! I'm Matías Cruz. I build automation and DevSecOps solutions that save time, reduce errors, and optimize operations at the corporate level. I currently work as an RPA Engineer at Cencosud, designing and implementing bots that interact with multiple critical systems and platforms.
description.p2: My experience ranges from secure data extraction and Active Directory management to integrating artificial intelligence for operational ticket classification. My current stack is heavily centered on Python and Playwright, always prioritizing performance, security, and code maintainability under the POM design pattern.
description.p3: I enjoy tackling architectural challenges, solving server configuration issues, and taking projects from conception to production deployment. If your team needs someone who understands both pure development and security operations, let's talk.

My First Game.title: My First Game
My First Game.description: Collaborative Unity game using C# with Lovnelies.
